CustomField.label: Assembly Source
CustomField.description: Records how this team member was added to the process. GIS_Auto_Assembly: created by NEPA_Team_Assembly_Orchestrator when protection layers were detected. Manual: added by a coordinator directly. Stage_Gate: added by NEPA_Stage_Gate_Orchestrator at a process milestone. Used to distinguish auto-assembled members from manually added ones during idempotent re-assembly.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: How this team member was added: GIS_Auto_Assembly, Manual, or Stage_Gate.
